title: Nursery Rhyme. DLXXVIII. Natural History.
content:
I like little pussy, her coat is so warm,
        And if I don't hurt her she'll do me no harm;
        So I'll not pull her tail, nor drive her away,
        But pussy and I very gently will play.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. DLXXVIII. Natural History.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
